rewrite for a wedding blog: they wanted to create Romantic, Elegant, Classic wedding with a touch of glam. and decided to have their wedding in marquee that opened out onto a deck that overlooked Swan River in Matilda Bay Reserve, Australia.

Their vision was to craft a wedding that exuded romance, elegance, and classic charm, with a hint of glamour. To bring this dream to life, they chose a marquee venue overlooking the mesmerizing Swan River at Matilda Bay Reserve in Australia.

rewrite for a wedding blog from the third pov: “Taj and I are native Oaklanders. Our paths first crossed in a home preschool where the supervisor enforced strict uniform guidelines. Then again in first grade at parochial school in the mid- 80's.  For the first 10 years of our lives, Taj and I shared milestone moments like school recitals, t-ball and soccer games. 
Around 4th/5th grade Taj moved to Seattle and I moved to a small school in Montclair. It would be nearly 17 years before we'd meet again. A meeting sparked by a Facebook post of our 2nd grade class. Upon reconnecting, Taj invited my cousin and I to his birthday party 'to break the ice' and the first faces I saw were Taj and his Mother's. The nostalgia of our younger years rushed back and the rest was history. Our first date was Election night 2008.
We were engaged in March 2013 a proposal fit for a Disney loving fanatic like myself, right in front of the enchanted castle for all to see. A day planned perfectly by my love.”

Taj and their partner, both native Oaklanders, found their paths intertwined since their early childhood. From attending the same home preschool with strict uniform guidelines to sharing school recitals and sports games during their early years, their lives were connected. However, around fourth and fifth grade, Taj relocated to Seattle while they moved to a small school in Montclair, causing a 17-year separation. 
The opportunity to reunite arose when a Facebook post featuring their second-grade class captured their attention. Taj, in an effort to break the ice, invited them and their cousin to his birthday party. As they arrived, Taj and his mother greeted them, evoking a wave of nostalgia from their younger days. From that moment, their reunion marked the beginning of a beautiful journey together. Their first date took place on Election Night 2008, setting the stage for their shared future.
March of 2013 brought a magical proposal, tailored perfectly for their partner's love for Disney. Taj proposed right in front of the enchanted castle, a moment witnessed and celebrated by all. It was a day flawlessly planned by the person they loved, marking the next chapter in their love story.

rewrite for a wedding blog from the third pov about Taj and Morgan: “Taj and I are native Oaklanders. Our paths first crossed in a home preschool where the supervisor enforced strict uniform guidelines. Then again in first grade at parochial school in the mid- 80’s. For the first 10 years of our lives, Taj and I shared milestone moments like school recitals, t-ball and soccer games.
Around 4th/5th grade Taj moved to Seattle and I moved to a small school in Montclair. It would be nearly 17 years before we’d meet again. A meeting sparked by a Facebook post of our 2nd grade class. Upon reconnecting, Taj invited my cousin and I to his birthday party ‘to break the ice’ and the first faces I saw were Taj and his Mother’s. The nostalgia of our younger years rushed back and the rest was history. Our first date was Election night 2008.
We were engaged in March 2013 a proposal fit for a Disney loving fanatic like myself, right in front of the enchanted castle for all to see. A day planned perfectly by my love.”

Taj and Morgan, both proud Oakland natives, found their lives intertwined from a young age. Their paths initially crossed in a home preschool where strict uniform guidelines were enforced, and they became classmates once again in first grade at a parochial school in the mid-80s. Throughout their formative years, Taj and Morgan shared countless milestone moments, from memorable school recitals to engaging t-ball and soccer games.
However, fate led them on different paths around fourth and fifth grade. Taj relocated to Seattle, while Morgan found themselves attending a small school in Montclair. Nearly 17 years would pass before their destinies realigned once more. A Facebook post featuring their second-grade class acted as the catalyst for their reunion and Taj, eager to reconnect, extended an invitation for Morgan and their cousin to attend his birthday party, hoping to break the ice. As they arrived, the first faces they encountered were Taj and his mother, instantly sparking a flood of nostalgia from their shared childhood years. And so, the foundation for their remarkable love story was laid. Their first official date took place on Election night in 2008, forever cementing a significant moment in their journey together.
Fast forward to March 2013, where Taj orchestrated a proposal befitting Morgan's adoration for all things Disney. In front of the enchanting castle, Taj got down on one knee, declaring their love for all to see. The proposal was flawlessly planned, a testament to Taj's thoughtfulness and understanding of Morgan's passions. From that day forward, their love story embarked on a new chapter, filled with even more enchantment and lifelong promises.

We were on a different design track initially, one that leaned toward a take on an old world Hollywood glam. Two weeks before the date the venue canceled for a number of venue related reasons. The new venue provided a sense of familiarity that was appreciated ultimately providing the perfect backdrop to play on the bride’s family’s roots.

The couple's main wish was to create a cozy and romantic celebration, infused with modern elements, as it held great significance for them. Initially, their design plans leaned towards an old-world Hollywood glamour theme. However, just two weeks before the wedding date, the original venue abruptly canceled due to various unforeseen circumstances. Thankfully, the couple discovered a new venue that offered a sense of familiarity, ultimately providing the perfect backdrop to honor the bride's family's heritage and create an unforgettable wedding experience.

She chose an Alyssa Kristin Gown, complemented perfectly by a Daughter's of Simone cape and Luna and Stone Bridal Accessories. Adding an extra touch of elegance, Morgan completed her look with Christian Louboutin heels, exuding timeless style and grace.

rewrite for a wedding blog using normal words: Designed by Taj, he wore a contemporary classic ensemble, a bespoke charcoal colored 3-piece suit featuring a single button jacket with wide black silk peak lapels, a charcoal colored 3-button shawl lapel vest, and a black cashmere turtle neck, finished off with black suede Prada boots for his footwear.

Taj, the mastermind behind the design, showcased a modern yet timeless ensemble for the occasion. He opted for a bespoke charcoal-colored 3-piece suit, exuding elegance and sophistication. The single-button jacket featured wide black silk peak lapels, perfectly complemented by a charcoal-colored 3-button shawl lapel vest. Taj completed the look with a black cashmere turtleneck, adding a touch of luxury. For footwear, he chose sleek black suede Prada boots, ensuring a fashionable and polished appearance.

Lea Stafford Events flawlessly orchestrated this intimate and romantic wedding, dedicating themselves to meticulously craft every single detail with utmost precision and care. Their expertise ensured that everything was executed to perfection, creating an unforgettable experience for the couple and their loved ones.

rewrite for a wedding blog using normal words: The ceremony was very romantic, when Morgan was going down the aisle, Taj was looking at her with a lot of adoration. The whole atmosphere was enchanting and touching.

The ceremony exuded a deep sense of romance as Morgan gracefully walked down the aisle. Taj's gaze was filled with immense adoration as he laid eyes on her, creating a truly heartwarming moment. The entire atmosphere was enchanting and emotionally touching, captivating everyone in attendance with its undeniable magic.
rewrite for a wedding blog using normal words: Besides the guests who attended the celebration, Taj and Morgan had special guests who were celebrating with them online and sending warm wishes.

In addition to the cherished guests present at the celebration, Taj and Morgan had the honor of sharing their special day with loved ones who joined them in spirit online, showering them with warm wishes and heartfelt celebrations from afar. Their virtual presence added an extra layer of joy and connection, making the day even more memorable and inclusive.

With the bride’s family being from NOLA, LSE wanted to touch on the family background a bit, LSE drew inspiration from NOLA’s garden district. Tapping into the old world influence the French left in NOLA, introducing euro inspired furniture, detail and texture. The main color palette, texture and contrast was important here. A velvet lined family table was set with lush flowers lining the center along with chestnuts and figs. This helped bring out the warmth of the day. The addition of chestnut and figs offers a gentle reminder of a season of thanks. As the couple got married in the thick of a pandemic, health and family was top of their minds so showing/expressing thankfulness and gratitude was a must. The taper candles selected provide the amazing level detail we were after, they were carved resulting in a spindled look. Wax seals with the bride and groom’s initials offered a final touch to each place card.

Drawing inspiration from the bride's family background in New Orleans, LSE (Lea Stafford Events) incorporated elements that paid homage to NOLA's enchanting Garden District. Taking cues from the city's French heritage and old-world influence, they introduced Euro-inspired furniture, intricate details, and textures. The carefully chosen main color palette, textures, and contrasts played a significant role in creating the desired ambiance. A family table, lined with sumptuous velvet, set the stage for lush flowers, chestnuts, and figs, evoking a warm and inviting atmosphere. This arrangement served as a gentle nod to the season of gratitude, reminding everyone to appreciate the blessings of the day. Given that the couple tied the knot during a challenging time amid the pandemic, their focus on health and family was paramount. Therefore, expressing thankfulness and gratitude became an essential aspect of the celebration. The meticulously selected taper candles, intricately carved to create a spindled appearance, added a remarkable level of detail to the overall decor. To complete the personalized touch, wax seals featuring the bride and groom's initials adorned each place card, adding a final, elegant flourish to the table setting.

Morgan and Taj were overflowing with joy, surrounded by their nearest and dearest on their special day. The outpouring of love and support they received filled their hearts with immense happiness and gratitude. Having their loved ones by their side made the celebration even more meaningful and unforgettable.
